# Jira Comment

The comment posted to the created Feature issue summarizes which sections were included and which were skipped, followed by the Comment Footnote.

## Comment Footnote

The comment ends with a horizontal rule followed by the footnote, rendered via ADF:

```json
{
  "type": "rule"
},
{
  "type": "paragraph",
  "content": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": "This comment was AI-generated by "
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": "sdlc-workflow/define-feature",
      "marks": [
        {
          "type": "link",
          "attrs": {
            "href": "https://github.com/mrizzi/sdlc-plugins"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "text": " v0.10.0."
    }
  ]
}
```

- **Link text:** sdlc-workflow/define-feature
- **Link URL:** https://github.com/mrizzi/sdlc-plugins
- **Version:** v0.10.0
